calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Ved Vora'S Petition To Compel Twitter, Inc. To Respond To Subpoena Issued For Case Pending In Foreign Jurisdiction Pursuant To C.C.P. 2029.600
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RUBEN PENA, Esq. of Kronenberger Rosenfeld, LLP (Tel: 415-955-1155) for petitioner Ved Vora;
Atty. KIM Y. NG, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLP (Tel: 650-838-4300) for Respondent Twitter, Inc.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER VED VORA's Petition To Compel Twitter, Inc. To Respond To Subpoena Issued For Case Pending In Foreign Jurisdiction Pursuant To C.C.P. 2029.600.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Petition is GRANTED.

Counsel for petitioner to prepare and email a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at williamclynn@gmail.com (cc'ing the opposing side).

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
